treatment_information.treatment_response: patient tolerated a regular diet and pain controlled with oral medications

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for small bowel obstruction
Nasogastric tube placed in stomach to decompress bowels
Conservative management applied including bowel rest and IV fluids
Patient discharged home with recovery instructions

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Weigh yourself every morning, call MD if weight goes up more than 3 lbs.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Hope for quick return to life and usual activities
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient was alert, interactive, and independent at discharge
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient tolerated a regular diet and expressed hope for a quick return to usual activities
